args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Recovery script to extract complete reverted code blocks from logs."}
args.CodeContent:
"import os, json

path = "/Users/shubhamjain/.gemini/antigravity/brain/f7a0b14d-8a6e-4317-9440-6e98c0661b0f/.system_generated/logs/transcript.jsonl"
with open(path, "r") as f:
    for line in f:
        obj = json.loads(line)
        step = obj.get("step_index")
        if step in [1271, 1275, 1285, 1291, 1365]:
            print(f"=== STEP {step} ===")
            if "tool_calls" in obj:
                for tc in obj["tool_calls"]:
                    args = tc.get("arguments", {})
                    # Look for replacementContent or codeContent
                    content = args.get("ReplacementContent") or args.get("CodeContent")
                    if content and "TestTypesView" in content:
                        print("Found in", tc.get("name"))
                        print("Content length:", len(content))
                        # Save it to a file!
                        out_name = f"scratch/recovered_step_{step}.txt"
                        with open(out_name, "w") as out_f:
                            out_f.write(content)
                        print("Saved to", out_name)
"
